column1: Figure6, S9-S13 - Nextclade output for SARS-CoV-2 Delta AY.39 lineages equences from mink (n = 176), humans (n = 389), and deer (n=24), used for subsequent mutation spectrum analysis in Figures 6b,c and Figures S9-S13
